title: EPIC: RickTerminal Foundation & Tauri Infrastructure
description: Set up the foundational Tauri 2.0 cross-platform application with Rust backend, React/TypeScript frontend, and core IPC communication layer. This epic covers all the boring but necessary infrastructure that makes everything else possible. Without this, we got nothing but a bunch of JavaScript files crying in the void.
acceptance_criteria: Tauri 2.0 project initializes and builds on macOS, Windows, and Linux
React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS frontend compiles without errors
Rust backend responds to IPC calls from frontend
SQLite database initializes and persists between app launches
Basic window chrome with Rick-themed dark mode renders correctly
